evidence.snippet:
**🚁 UAV & Drone-Ready EO/IR Payloads**
Fully integrated payloads built for UAS, drones, and manned platforms.
*   Gyro-Stabilized Gimbals (2 to 5 Axis)
*   MEMS, IMU, and Gyro-Based Image Stabilization
*   Custom Ball Turrets for Airborne, Marine & Ground Use
*   Payloads for sUAS, VTOL, fixed-wing, and rotorcraft
Applications include ISR, C-UAS, LRF targeting, and border enforcement.

Browse Our Large Selection of Gyro Stabilized Thermal Drone Cameras
-------------------------------------------------------------------
The epitome of stability and precision with our extensive range of gyro-stabilized thermal drone cameras, meticulously engineered to capture the most intricate details even in the most challenging conditions.

items.notes: Core product line: gyro-stabilized EO/IR thermal gimbals for UAV/UAS integration (M1-D, M2D series, M7D) plus long-range PTZ cameras for ISR applications.

evidence.snippet:
1.  Novel Digital Imaging Sensors in Various Infrared Wavelengths
2.  Innovative Image and Signal Processing Techniques
3.  AI and Machine Learning for SWaP Constrained Devices
4.  Computer Vision and Photogrammetry Solutions

**🧩 Specialty Sensors & Core Technologies**
*   SWIR InGaAs Cameras & Sensors
*   LLLTV Color Imaging Modules
*   Digital Electronic Image Intensifiers
*   OLED Microdisplays & Helmet-Mounted Displays
*   Custom Weapon Sights, Binoculars & Clip-On Systems
*   NVG / DNVG / DNVS / DI² / EI² Lines
*   Rugged 4K Imaging and Ultra Low-Light Cameras

items.notes: SWIR InGaAs cameras, LLLTV sensors, IMU/MEMS-based image stabilization, and multi-spectral sensor modules sold as standalone components.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: SPI (Sierra Pacific Innovations) designs and manufactures gyro-stabilized EO/IR thermal gimbals and multi-sensor payloads for integration on UAV/UAS platforms. They sell to UAV integrators and OEMs, not complete aircraft.

products.notes: Additional product families (thermal scopes, night vision binoculars/goggles, laser systems) exist but are primarily non-UAV products.

ndaa.notes: No NDAA Section 848/889 mention anywhere in corpus. Site references ITAR export controls but no NDAA claim.

evidence.snippet: SPI is a proven battle-tested, full-service imaging company with over 20 years of experience.
Our products are some of the most rugged thermal imaging systems on the market as they consistently exceed military standards for land, sea, and air.

readiness.notes: 20+ years of serial production; listed catalog SKUs with active online shop. Also offers custom engineering services as a secondary offering.

unresolved_questions: Contact page and aerial solutions page list two different Las Vegas addresses; could not confirm which is primary HQ.
ITAR regulated but NDAA compliance status not disclosed on site.
tagline: Manufactures gyro-stabilized EO/IR thermal gimbals (M-series) and long-range PTZ thermal cameras for UAV/UAS platforms, plus thermal weapon sights; production-ready across multiple form factors from 160g micro gimbals to cooled MWIR systems. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; no major contract wins identified in public record.
